dsl_rule.translation_notes: Breakaway Gap pattern translated using price gap detection (close vs prev_close), volume surge (volume > prev_volume), and directional continuation (high/low breakouts). Entry conditions check for gap + volume confirmation + directional move. Exit uses reversal logic since author provided no specific exit. Stop-loss set conservatively at 2% given gap volatility. Hold period limited to 5 days as gaps typically resolve quickly per source material.

source_rule_text: Breakaway Gap: Price gaps in direction of new trend with volume rise and formation of new highs or lows
